description:
Debug Box is a ProtoFlux node that when called will make a cube visual at the global coordinates with a size provided and will appear for a duration in seconds. The visual will appear under the Root of a world. In most cases, the debug visuals will be drawn over most materials, letting you see them easily.

See also: Coordinate spaces

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Call this to spawn a debug box visual in the root of the world with the provided parameters.
fields.Position: The position in global space for the debug visual. Default at the node.
fields.Size: The size of the box visual in meters.
fields.Orientation: The Rotation in global space for the debug visual. Default 0.
fields.ForwardColor: The color for the box visual generated. Defaults to white.
fields.Duration: How long the debug box visual appears for in seconds.
fields.Next: Fires after * (Call) is impulsed and the visual was created successfully.
